There are dime a dozen shops to spoil you with choices. From garments, to textiles, to home decor etc etc. Name it and you would find it here. There are several eatries too by the road side. My favorite of all time is dal ladoo with muli ki chatni. It's an amazing appetizer. The market offers you brand and non brand selection of items. title: Lajpat Nagar Market

open_hours: {"Friday":["10 am–9 pm"],"Monday":["Closed"],"Saturday":["10 am–9 pm"],"Sunday":["10 am–9 pm"],"Thursday":["10 am–9 pm"],"Tuesday":["10 am–9 pm"],"Wednesday":["10 am–9 pm"]}

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Digant Chandela","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7sj6fM6CRvNc1ev0AQ9e1H_vv03JkmjzFwjS4EGHkt8OC6Ewc1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lajpat Nagar Market is one of Delhi’s most popular and bustling shopping destinations. It’s a paradise for those looking for affordable fashion, accessories, and home decor. From trendy outfits and traditional Indian wear to street-side jewelry and footwear, the market offers a little bit of everything.

However, like most popular markets, it does come with a few downsides. The market can get crowded during peak hours, especially on weekends, making it a bit overwhelming at times. Traffic congestion in and around the area is common, so it’s best to plan your visit accordingly. While the market is vibrant, a little bit of plastic waste and litter here and there takes away from the overall charm.

On the positive side, accessibility is excellent, as the market is just a short walk from the Lajpat Nagar Metro Station, making it easy to reach. Once there, you can treat yourself to some delicious street food. Dolma Aunty’s Momos, located near the market entrance, are a must-try for their flavor and quality.

Overall, Lajpat Nagar Market is a great spot for budget-friendly shopping and street food, but be prepared for the crowds and traffic. With some cleaner surroundings, it could be an even better experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOiHRkmb1yVBqh4wO3TwkoZOgPJJTKR_3MdNoXo&fid=0x0:0x2c59052f92f5a79f"],"When":"2024-12-15"},{"Name":"Shilpa Shandil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuuD5TyGHM4OAH-jgHDRfUk6DMnfj4vQWynEeOP_EXfErumg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lajpat Nagar is one of the best and most affordable markets in South Delhi.
Dedicate a day to experience the shopping vibes. For shopping lover like me this  place has everything from brands to local fadi market ,Indian ethnic wear, westernwear,accesories,makeup, food,home decor. Fabric collection is really good here.

Lajpat Nagar Market is well connected by Metro as well as by Road . Parking can be challange over the weekends specially during peak business hours and festivals.
Cinema theater as well as food restaurants are available near by.
I highly recommend trying the Ram Laddu and Dolma Aunty Momos.
Amazing shopping experience here. Very crowded, but found the best of all products. Quite popular among middle eastern, Afghan and Iranian origin persons as well.
Happy Shopping 😊","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMR_OO7qmDjto6pk1fDYu-W9deiwctP0EfWeWfB&fid=0x0:0x2c59052f92f5a79f"],"When":"2024-11-7"},{"Name":"Yogesh Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5XanLKULbBpW2hPrIXKJmhs9vmlWaQRFA7wsdndY5MMl48dVc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Local market is very good with bargaining & fixed price both.local street food teste is also amazing, with marketing.There are multiple resturant and I join banshiwala at metro station gate no. 5. I will give 3.5 rating for food and 4 point for ambience out of 5.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMVmG0AJvbok_74oMEodqoFvyPDA-f6Qq9T02FL&fid=0x0:0x2c59052f92f5a79f"],"When":"2025-1-3"},{"Name":"Sahil Majhi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWo0WDnmeBX8E2HhPr-Ocklxl5xD76MkrAAu5BbbW9oE4mxMfme0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lajpat Nagar Market - A Shopper's Paradise! 🛍️🌟

If you’re a shopping enthusiast, Lajpat Nagar Market in Delhi is a must-visit! 🏙️ This bustling market has something for everyone, from trendy clothes 👗 to stylish accessories 💍, beautiful home decor 🏡, and a fantastic collection of Indian ethnic wear 🥻. The variety here is unmatched, and the prices are super reasonable! 💸

What I love most is the vibrant atmosphere ✨ – it's lively, colorful, and full of energy. You can find great bargains if you’re ready to haggle a bit 😉, and there are so many unique finds! The food stalls here are also a delight 🍲 – a perfect break between shopping sprees.

Highly recommend visiting if you’re in Delhi! Whether you're a local or a tourist, Lajpat Nagar Market will give you an authentic taste of Delhi's shopping culture. 🧡","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOMT4-wvYCjJ4iDzvuv5CQEfJ5Pfi4_GWDO9kBr&fid=0x0:0x2c59052f92f5a79f"],"When":"2024-11-5"},{"Name":"RAJIEW SHARMA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVafPB7875XpSfaqlwZF8IQSAWTQorkdBKa9oTLb1JDL3N4CHvB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Famous Market from South Delhi ... You can reach here by Bus and then rikshaw/auto rikshaw to the market  ...  You can also use your own vehicle or directly to the market by using an Auto rickshaw or taxi ... But Delhi Metro is probably the best option to reach Lajpat Nagar Market ... Delhi Metro's violet line and Pink line intersects here ... So one has two metro line options here .. footfall in the market is in good numbers ..

Daily wearable clothing , jewellery , Plastic products, inner wear , artificial jewellery , food plaza , footwear, toys , T shirts , trendy wear , makeup items, Paintings , Chat , Momos , juice and what not .. reasonable pricing and good quality ...

Parks are also there , where one can rest but Market is so good that it takes at least 3 hours to complete shopping .. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Navneet Kashyap","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8MtSZwXAaJAhpEyGO1fUhcFpnH2NOinMSNN2B92qsPiHkAnUW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited this place after Christmas, and I had a great experience overall ☺️ . The mall is spacious, clean, and well-lit, making it comfortable to walk around 🚶🏻 and explore. The variety of stores 🏬 is impressive, from high-end brands to more affordable options, catering to a wide range of tastes and budgets. There's also a good mix of fashion, electronics, and lifestyle stores, so you're likely to find something you need or want.

One of the highlights is the food 🍱 court. It offers a diverse selection of eateries, from fast food 🥘 to more sit-down options, and I was pleased with the quality of food. There are also several restaurants located throughout the mall, which is great for a more relaxed dining experience.

Parking 🅿️ is convenient, with ample space and easy access to entrances, although it can get crowded during peak hours. I also appreciate the mall's focus on cleanliness and safety, as staff are regularly visible and attentive.

If I had to point out a downside, it would be the crowding on weekends, which can make for a slightly less pleasant experience, especially in certain sections like the main entrances or around popular stores.

Overall, this is a solid choice for a day of shopping or leisure. It's a one-stop destination that offers a mix of retail, dining, and entertainment options, making it easy to spend hours there without getting bored..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP3Iq9mwywzXpEP_G5sPPIVvyx1MUCD6fMTJb6B&fid=0x0:0x81c366c7998e72a3"],"When":"2025-1-3"},{"Name":"Anirban Karmakar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR3-URStWGPmIM5GsSJFk9AC6i4Fec5ULmhK1RA9i8a-H-FFxY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Select City Walk, Saket is a fantastic destination for anyone looking to enjoy a complete day out. It offers a vibrant shopping experience with a variety of stores to choose from. The location is well-planned, with ample parking space, ensuring a hassle-free visit.

One of the best features of this place is the open space, which provides a refreshing area to sit and relax. Families visiting with children will especially appreciate this, as the open area is perfect for kids to play freely and safely.

Additionally, the presence of excellent restaurants around enhances the overall experience, making it an ideal spot for food enthusiasts. With two malls, Select City Walk and the neighboring DLF Avenue Mall, located side by side, visitors can easily spend quality time exploring both.

Overall, it’s a must-visit destination for shopping, dining, and unwinding, whether you’re with family or friends!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNKmiqeGNJtxnLtG9MjfTElSts3MKPqBMBVYlf_&fid=0x0:0x81c366c7998e72a3"],"When":"2024-11-22"},{"Name":"Raj","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJjpsyrvXqlqQYyjDtE5JONZmcgAsEJO3qXic0YODiyWWU22uX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Select Citywalk in Saket is one of Delhi’s premier shopping destinations, offering a fantastic mix of international brands, popular food outlets, and a luxurious ambience. The presence of an Apple Store and a wide range of global fashion and lifestyle brands makes it a one-stop solution for all your needs.

The parking space is well-organized and spacious, ensuring a hassle-free visit even during busy hours. Additionally, its proximity to the Saket Metro Station makes it super convenient to reach by public transport. Select Citywalk offers an upscale shopping experience with top-notch dining options and a well-curated range of stores. Definitely worth visiting for a complete day out!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPFXvg_uM3VBUOPO3VsUGDcq1QbQigjiL7JaX3C&fid=0x0:0x81c366c7998e72a3"],"When":"2024-9-23"},{"Name":"Billal Hossain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0tevwlgDeLq1C47k84iE9bKsZzaz2GjcpWfAtI_a3HadtJtz7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited Nexus Select CityWalk Mall, and I had a fantastic experience. [{"Name":"Saloni Sikdar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0TUOb3zY2T70wnL_SySlZYgUXWpKZobSotEDSu-7H87vtZShPIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This was, hands down, the most uncomfortable movie-watching experience I’ve ever had. The seats were atrocious – wooden, poorly designed, with no headrest, no spine support, and just a thin layer of foam that did little to mask the hard surface beneath. Sitting through the movie felt more like enduring punishment than entertainment.

We opted for the back-row seats, hoping for some comfort, but even those were unbearable. I can’t imagine how much worse the front-row seats must be.

To make matters worse, the ticket prices at the box office were inexplicably higher than what was listed on BookMyShow. How does that even happen?

For a theatre charging such steep prices, the least they could do is provide comfortable seating and a decent viewing experience. I’d seriously reconsider visiting this place again unless they make significant improvements.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM2Q4YQA0jXrEQpaPUK_2PheXond1TKFwSlxKLe&fid=0x0:0x477df6cc8c23cb8a"],"When":"2024-12-19"},{"Name":"Priyansh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKSr0k69BgHtRtkJSSW6WHRcinQ-FB6UZ0O4AUjnmfiLweTTUG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Ambience of this place was really nice I I visited this place with my FEMALE friend for the Very first time and I really loved this place and Their services too !!
